diffs.diff:
--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -14,8 +14,18 @@
 

     device = torch.device('cuda' if torch.cuda.is_available() else 'cpu')

     ckpt = torch.load(args.checkpoint, map_location=device)

+    state_dict = ckpt['model']

+

+    # Remove torch.compile wrapper prefix if present

+    new_state_dict = {}

+    for k, v in state_dict.items():

+        if k.startswith('_orig_mod.'):

+            new_state_dict[k[len('_orig_mod.'):]] = v

+        else:

+            new_state_dict[k] = v

+

     model = MLP().to(device)

-    model.load_state_dict(ckpt['model'])

+    model.load_state_dict(new_state_dict)

     model.eval()

 

     input_path = os.path.join(args.data_path, 'scoring_input.npy')

--- a/train.py
+++ b/train.py
@@ -121,16 +121,23 @@
                 'step': global_step,

                 'epoch': epoch,

                 'val_loss': val_loss,

-                'val_mean_r2': mean_r2

+                'val_mean_r2': mean_r2,

+                'epoch_time': time.time() - epoch_start,

             }) + '\n')

 

         print(f"Epoch {epoch+1}/{args.epochs} | val_loss={val_loss:.6f} | val_mean_r2={mean_r2:.6f} | time={time.time()-epoch_start:.1f}s")

 

         if val_loss < best_loss:

             best_loss = val_loss

-            ckpt_path = os.path.join(args.save_dir, 'best.pt')

-            torch.save({'model': model.state_dict(), 'epoch': epoch, 'val_loss': val_loss}, ckpt_path)

-            print(f"Saved best model to {ckpt_path} (val_loss={val_loss:.6f})")

+            # Save unwrapped state_dict to avoid _orig_mod prefix

+            raw_model = model._orig_mod if hasattr(model, '_orig_mod') else model

+            save_dict = {

+                'model': raw_model.state_dict(),

+                'epoch': epoch,

+                'val_loss': val_loss,

+            }

+            torch.save(save_dict, os.path.join(args.save_dir, 'best.pt'))

+            print(f"Saved best model to checkpoints/best.pt (val_loss={val_loss:.6f})")

 

     print("Training complete.")
